title: KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender with Mill - 2 Speed Settings - Pulse Setting - 35ml Measuring Cup - Separate Grinder Mill Attachment -Plastic Jug - Ivory White - E5012WI
features: 2 SPEED SETTINGS: Pressing 1 will operate the motor continuously at a low/medium rate. Pressing 2 will operate the motor continuously at the maximum rate for a finer blend
PULSE FUNCTION BUTTON: Press the pulse function to operate the motor in short bursts. The motor will only operate for the duration that the pulse button is pressed.
STAINLESS STEEL BLADES: The stainless steel blades rotate rapidly to finely chop and blend ingredients into a smooth liquid texture.
GRINDER MILL INCLUDED: This blender comes with a grinder mill attachment that can be used in place of the plastic jug to grind/mill coffee, spices, herbs and more.
RUBBER SUCTION FEET: The feet will stick to the kitchen surface to ensure that the blender is sturdy and will stay in place during operation.
description: The KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender with Mill is perfect for any kitchen. With 2 speed settings it is suitable for lots of different ingredients. It also has a pulse function button which provides short, powerful bursts if this is what is required. The blades are stainless steel, these rotate rapidly to finely chop and blend ingredients in to a smooth liquid texture. As well as the plastic blending jug, also included is a grinder/mill attachment, you attach this in place of the jug and can then grind your coffee beans, spices, herbs and more. A 35ml measuring cup is also included, this sits in the top of the removable lid. This is great for accurately measuring liquids before adding them to the jug. Rubber suction feet provide grip, they will stick to the kitchen surface to ensure the blender stays in place whilst in operation. Box Includes: 1 KitchenPerfected 500w 1.5Ltr Table Blender with Mill Plastic Jug with Lid Grinder Mill Attachment Instruction Manual
